sentences.text: This extension adds vector instructions that multiply BF16 numbers and accumulate into FP32.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation

sentences.text: This extension depends upon the `Zvfbfmin` extension and the `Zfbfmin` extension.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation
Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: vfwmaccbf16.vv vd, vs1, vs2, vm + vfwmaccbf16.vf vd, rs1, vs2, vm +
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: Encoding (Vector-Vector):: [wavedrom, , svg] .... {reg:[ {bits: 7, name: '1010111', attr:['OP-V']}, {bits: 5, name: 'vd'}, {bits: 3, name: '001', attr:['OPFVV']}, {bits: 5, name: 'vs1'}, {bits: 5, name: 'vs2'}, {bits: 1, name: 'vm'}, {bits: 6, name: '111011', attr:['vfwmaccbf16']}, ]} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: Encoding (Vector-Scalar):: [wavedrom, , svg] .... {reg:[ {bits: 7, name: '1010111', attr:['OP-V']}, {bits: 5, name: 'vd'}, {bits: 3, name: '101', attr:['OPFVF']}, {bits: 5, name: 'rs1'}, {bits: 5, name: 'vs2'}, {bits: 1, name: 'vm'}, {bits: 6, name: '111011', attr:['vfwmaccbf16']}, ]} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: Reserved Encodings:: * `SEW` is any value other than 16
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16
Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: | Vd | input | 32 | FP32 Accumulate | Vs1/rs1 | input | 16 | BF16 Source | Vs2 | input | 16 | BF16 Source | Vd | output | 32 | FP32 Result |
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: This instruction performs a widening fused multiply-accumulate operation, where each pair of BF16 values are multiplied and their unrounded product is added to the corresponding FP32 accumulate value.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: The sum is rounded according to the frm register.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: In the vector-vector version, the BF16 elements are read from `vs1` and `vs2` and FP32 accumulate value is read from `vd`.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: The FP32 result is written to the destination register `vd`.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: The vector-scalar version is similar, but instead of reading elements from `vs1`, a scalar BF16 value is read from the FPU register `rs1`.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16
Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: This `vfwmaccbf16.vv` instruction is equivalent to widening each of the BF16 inputs to FP32 and then performing an FMACC as shown in the following instruction sequence:
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: [source,asm] -- vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v T1, vs1, vm vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v T2, vs2, vm vfmacc.vv vd, T1, T2, vm --
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: Likewise, `vfwmaccbf16.vf` is equivalent to the following instruction sequence:
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16

sentences.text: [source,asm] -- fcvt.s.bf16 T1, rs1 vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v T2, vs2, vm vfmacc.vf vd, T1, T2, vm --
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfwma` Extension for Vector BF16 Widening Multiply-Accumulation > vfwmaccbf16
